title: agrostis canina
intro: Agrostis canina, also known as bog cotton-grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Agrostis canina include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Agrostis canina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory problems. Agrostis canina is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots, leaves, and stems can be used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
